titleStmt.title: SII 4.692: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 692. (A.R. No. 241 of 1892).This is the Telugu version of 106[1] in the Annual Report on Epigraphy for 1893 should correctly be Śaka 1069 as given in 1. 11. ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samadhigata
paṁcamahāśabdamahāmaṁḍalēśvara vīramahēśvara ku
lōttuṁgacōḍadēvadivyaśrīpādārādhaka parabalasā
dhaka du¨rjjayakulakulācalamṛgēṁdra satyahariścaṁdra
pratijñāparuśurāma yaniyaṁkkabhīma satyarādhēya śau
cāṁjunēya yeladāyasiṁha vikramanṛsiṁha su
janavanajavasaṁtta kāṁtājayaṁtta vivēkapadmāsana giri
paścimasāsana vitaraṇaraṇavinōda kasturikāmōda ha
yavatsarāja rājamanōja kuṁdāṁbikānaṁdana vibhava
saṁkraṁdananāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāma
ṁḍalēśvara koṁḍapaḍumaṭi mallerāju śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1069 nē
ṁṭi yuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtinimittamuna śrīnādiṁḍlakē
śavadēvaraku nakhaṁḍava¨rttidīpaṁbunaku niccina goṟiyalu
55 . vīniṁ jēkoni nādiṁḍla ciṭṭakommanabōyuni koḍku mā
leṁmabōyuṁḍu tana putrānupautrika mācaṁdrā¨rkkamu
nitya māneṁḍu neyi yakhaṁḍava[¨rtti]dīpaṁbunakuṁ bōya
ṁgalavāṁḍu . maṟiyunu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara mallerā
ju śrīkēśavadēvaraku dīpamu veṭṭiṁcina yā dinamunaṁddē śrī
mūlasthānamahādēvaraku nakhaṁḍava¨rttidīpaṁbunaku niccina
55 . vīniṁ jēkoni nādiṁḍla The
Digital edition of SII 4.692 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
